rationale: Ground truth is nearly empty (LGTM + an unrelated request to spin off a VoxCPM2 fix into a separate PR, not inferable from this diff), so both candidates converge on the same correct outcome (APPROVE) via similarly deep, well-grounded tracing of the seed-propagation mechanism through serving_speech.py and gpu_model_runner.py. X reads as a thorough validation report but stops at confirming correctness. Y does the same verification plus adds concrete, line-anchored suggestions (a guard comment at yaml:60/90 to prevent regression, and a grounded observation that stage 1's seed removal is inert because temperature=0.0), making it more actionable; its references to specific prior PR numbers are a minor unverifiable-precision risk but don't undermine the core analysis.
